name: academic-skills-food-nutrition
description: Original, MIT-licensed academic skills for food, nutrition & agricultural science: research, journal-aware writing, peer review, and end-to-end orchestration, plus publisher-tiered journal author-guideline skills (food, nutrition, agriculture Q1/Q2, and multidisciplinary) and a scientific figure workflow, for Claude Code, Codex, MiniMax Agent, and OpenClaw. Initiated by the Food Science Group, University of Melbourne; contributions from food, nutrition & agriculture research groups worldwide welcome.
